new_jobs.title: آمر تکنالوژی معلوماتی (بست سوم)
new_jobs.description:
Role Summary
هدف وظيفه:
مدیریت، نظارت و فراهم آوری تسهیلات فنی و تخنیکی جهت عرضه خدمات بهتر تکنالوژی معلوماتی و مخابراتی .

Duties and Responsibilities
وظایف و مسئولیت ها
وظایف اساسی
ﮐﻧﺗرول از راﺟﺳﺗرﯾﺷن دوﻣﯾن ھﺎی ﻣرﺑوطﮫ وزارت ﺑﮫ ﻣﻧظور ﻓﻌﺎل ﻧﮕﮭداﺷﺗن ﺳﯾﺳﺗم ھﺎی آﻧﻠﯾن وزارت.
ﻧظﺎرت از اﻣور ﺗﺧﻧﯾﮑﯽ ﺳرورھﺎ ﺑﮫ ﻣﻧظور ﻓﻌﺎل ﺑودن آﻧﮭﺎ ﺟﮭت اﺳﺗﻔﺎده ﻣﻌﻘول دراﻣوررﺳﻣﯽ وزارت.
ﻧظﺎرت ازﭘروﺳﮫ ﻧﺻب ﺳرورھﺎ، ﺳوﭼﮭﺎ، ﺗﻠﯾﻔون داﺧﻠﯽ ﯾﺎ (PABX) و ﮐﻣره ھﺎی اﻣﻧﯾﺗﯽ ﺑﮫ ﻣﻧظور اﺳﺗﻔﺎده ﻣوﺛردرﺳطﺢ وزارت ·
رﻓﻊ ﻣﺷﮑﻼت ﺗﺧﻧﯾﮑﯽ وﻓﻧﯽ ﺳﯾﺳﺗم ﻓﺎﯾروال ﺑﻣﻧظورﺟﻠوﮔﯾری ازآﺳﯾب ھﺎی داﺧﻠﯽ و ﺑﯾروﻧﯽ ﺷﺑﮑﮫ ﻧﺗورک وزارت.
ﻧظﺎرت ازروﻧد اﯾﺟﺎد دﯾﺗﺎﺑﯾس ھﺎ دررﯾﺎﺳت ھﺎ ﺑﮫ ﺷﮑل ﻓﻧﯽ ﺑﺎ اﺳﺗﻔﺎده از ﻣﯾﺗود ﻣوﺟود ﺑﻣﻧظورﻋرﺿﮫ ﺧدﻣﺎت ﺑﮭﺗرﺗﮑﻧﺎﻟوژی ﻣﻌﻠوﻣﺎﺗﯽ.
ﮐﻧﺗرول و ﻧظﺎرت ازﭼﮕوﻧﮕﯽ اﺳﺗﻔﺎده ازاﻧﺗرﻧت درﺷﻌﺑﺎت وزارت ﺟﮭت ﺟﻠوﮔﯾری ازﺳوء اﺳﺗﻔﺎده.
ﻧظﺎرت وﮐﻧﺗرول ازاﻣورﺗﺧﻧﯾﮑﯽ ﮐﻣره ھﺎی اﻣﻧﯾﺗﯽ وزارت ودﺳﺗﮕﺎه ﻣرﺑوطﮫ آن ﻏرض ﺣﺻول اطﻣﯾﻧﺎن ازﻓﻌﺎل ﺑودن ﺑﻣﻧظورﺗﺎﻣﯾن ھرﭼﮫ ﺑﮭﺗر اﻣﻧﯾت.
اﯾﺟﺎد و ﻧﺻب ﺳﯾﺳﺗم ھﺎی اﻣﻧﯾﺗﯽ از ﻗﺑﯾل ﻓﺎﯾروال ھﺎ و اﻧﺗﯽ وﯾروس ﺑﮫ ﮐﻣﭘﯾوﺗر ھﺎی ﺳرورﻏرض ﺟﻠوﮔﯾری از ﺗﺄﺧﯾر در ﻓﻌﺎﻟﯾت ﺳﯾﺳﺗم ﺗﮑﻧﺎﻟوژی ﻣﻌﻠوﻣﺎﺗﯽ.
ﻧظﺎرت و ﮐﻧﺗرول از روﻧد آﭘدﯾت ﻧﻣودن ﻣﻌﻠوﻣﺎت ﻻزم در ﺳرورھﺎی وزارت اﻗﺗﺻﺎد ﺟﮭت ﺣﺻول اطﻣﯾﻧﺎن از ﻓﻌﺎل ﺑودن ﺳﯾﺳﺗم ھﺎی ﺗﮑﻧﺎﻟوژی ﻣﻌﻠوﻣﺎﺗﯽ و وﯾب ﺳﺎﯾت رﺳﻣﯽ وزارت ﺟﮭت اﺳﺗﻔﺎده ﮐﺎرﮐﻧﺎن، ﻣﺷﺗرﯾﺎن و ﻣردم ﻋﺎم .
اﻧﮑﺷﺎف طرزاﻟﻌﻣل ھﺎ ورھﻧﻣود ھﺎ و اراﺋﮫ ﺧدﻣﺎت ﻻزم Network IT ﯾﺎ ﺗﮑﻧﺎﻟوژی ﻣﻌﻠوﻣﺎﺗﯽ.
ﮐﻧﺗرول وﺑررﺳﯽ ازدﯾزاﯾن واﯾﺟﺎد ﺷﺑﮑﮫ داﺧﻠﯽ وﻣﺳﺗﻘلNetwork) Area (Local آﻣرﯾت ﺗﮑﻧﺎﻟوژی ﻣﻌﻠوﻣﺎﺗﯽ وزارت .
ﺑررﺳﯽ ﻧﯾﺎزﻣﻧدی ھﺎی ﺷﻌﺑﺎت ﭘﯾراﻣون ﺗﺟﮭﯾزھرﭼﮫ ﺑﮭﺗرﺳﯾﺳﺗم ﺗﮑﻧﺎﻟوژی ﻣﻌﻠوﻣﺎﺗﯽ .

Job Requirements
وظﺎﯾف ھﻣﺎھﻧﮕﯽ
اﯾﺟﺎد ھﻣﺎھﻧﮕﯽ و ﺗﺎﻣﯾن ارﺗﺑﺎط ﮐﺎری ﻣوﺛر ﺑﺎ ادارات ﻣرﮐزی و وﻻﯾﺗﯽ وزارت ﺟﮭت ﺗﺳﮭﯾل اﺟرای ﻓﻌﺎﻟﯾت ھﺎی ﭘﻼن ﺷده.
اﯾﺟﺎد ھﻣﺎھﻧﮕﯽ و ﺗﺎﻣﯾن ارﺗﺑﺎطﺎت ﺑﺎ ادارات ﻣرﺗﺑط ﺟﮭت ﺣﺻول اطﻣﯾﻧﺎن ﭘﯾﺷﺑرد ﺑﮭﺗر اﻣور ﻣرﺑوطﮫ.
ﺷراﯾط اﺳﺗﺧدام
ﺗﺎﺑﻌﯾت اﻓﻐﺎﻧﺳﺗﺎن را داﺷﺗﮫ ﺑﺎﺷد.
ﺳن وی از (18)ﺳﺎل ﮐﻣﺗر واز (64)ﺳﺎل ﺑﯾﺷﺗر ﻧﺑﺎﺷد.
ﺳوﯾﮫ ﺗﺣﺻﯾﻠﯽ
داﺷﺗن ﺳﻧد ﺗﺣﺻﯾﻠﯽ ﻟﯾﺳﺎﻧس در ﯾﮑﯽ از رﺷﺗﮫ ھﺎی ﮐﻣﭘﯾوﺗرﺳﺎﻧﯾس، ﺗﮑﻧﺎﻟوژی ﻣﻌﻠوﻣﺎﺗﯽ، اﻧﺟﻧﯾری ﻧرم اﻓزارﺷﺑﮑﮫ (communication IT) ﺑﮫ ﺗﺎﺋﯾد وزارت ﺗﺣﺻﯾﻼت ﻋﺎﻟﯽ رﺳﯾده ﺑﺎﺷد ﺑﮫ دارﻧده ﮔﺎن درﺟﮫ ﺗﺣﺻﯾﻠﯽ ﺑﺎﻻﺗر در رﺷﺗﮫ ھﺎی ﻓوق اﻟذﮐر ارﺟﺣﯾت داده ﻣﯾﺷود.
ﺗﺟرﺑﮫ ﮐﺎری
ﺣد اﻗل ﯾﮏ ﺳﺎل .
ﻣﮭﺎرﺗﮭﺎی ﻻزم
ﺗواﻧﺎﺋﯽ رھﻧﻣﺎﺋﯽ وﮐﻧﺗرول ﺑﺧش ﻣرﺑوطﮫ.
ﻗﺎﺑﻠﯾت طرح وﺗﻌﯾن ﺧط ﻣﺷﯽ )ﭘﺎﻟﯾﺳﯽ اداره /وزارت ﻣرﺑوطﮫ.
ﺗﺳﻠط ﺑﮫ ﯾﮑﯽ از زﺑﺎن ھﺎی رﺳﻣﯽ ﻣﻠﯽ (دری ﯾﺎ ﭘﺷﺗو)
ﻣﮭﺎرت ھﺎی ﮐﻣﭘﯾوﺗری در ﺑرﻧﺎﻣﮫ ھﺎی ﻣرﺗﺑط ﺑﮫ وظﯾﻔﮫ ﻣرﺑوطﮫ.

Submission Guidelines
آگهی
وزارت اقتصاد به همکاری ریاست فرآهم آوری تسهیلات تعیینات و هماهنګی امور ولایات، ریاست اصلاحات اداری و خدمات ملکی ریاست عمومی اداره امور به منظور سپردن کار به اهل آن و ایجاد اداره سالم و مسلکی بست رتبه سوم آمریت تکنالوژی معلوماتی کمبود خویش را از تاریخ ۱۴۰۵/۴/۱۶ الی ۱۴۰۵/۴/۲۷ مطابق تاریخ ۱۴۴۸/۱/۲۱ الی ۱۴۴۸/۲/۳ به اعلان می‌سپارد.
داوطلبان واجد شرایط می توانند فورم درخواستی را از لینک ذیل به دست آورده، بعد از خانه پری به شکل PDF که حجم آن بیشتر از MB ۵ نباشد به ایمیل آدرس ( recruitment.arcsa@aop.gov.af ) ارسال نمایند.
داوطلبان واجد شرایط می‌توانند فورم کاریابی را بشکل حضوری از ریاست فرآهم آوری تسهیلات تعیینات و هماهنگی امور ولایات، ریاست اصلاحات اداری و خدمات ملکی واقع ناحیه پنجم، سرک قرغه، بین چهار راهی پوهنتون تعلیم و تربیه و چهار راهی قمبر، ایستګاه سه راهی دیوان بیګی، انستیتوت خدمات ملکی - کابل اخذ نموده و پس از خانه پری دوباره تسلیم نمایند.
قابل ذکر است از ارسال فورم درخواستی همزمان به صورت آنلاین و حضوری خوداری نموده تا از تکرار فورم درخواستی جلوگیری صورت گیرد.
نوت: ضم نمودن کاپی اسناد تحصیلی، تجربه کاری و تذکرۀ تابعیت با فورم درخواستی حتمی میباشد.
شماره تماس: ۰۲۰۲۱۴۳۰۵۸
لینک لایحه وظایف بست اعلان شده:
https://drive.google.com/file/d/1Y_N2KwQUdme6U24oE05SIpT5APq7PB0w/view?usp=sharing
لینک فورم درخواست به شکل پی دی اف:
https://drive.google.com/file/d/10kSjtThd1EI_wX1pW_nY2fQQOVTiWU5S/view?usp=sharing
لینک فورم درخواستی به شکل ورد:
https://docs.google.com/document/d/1I7WAeIgl29IY5fLg2I3357kZyfnXEKOi/edit?usp=sharing&ouid=117260732927013994098&rtpof=true&sd=true

new_jobs.title: Transmission Officer
new_jobs.salary: As per company salary scale policy
new_jobs.description:
About Hindukush Bridge ICT-Services Company
HKB-ICT is a leading internet and communication company aiming to make Afghanistan go online in ten coming years.
Hindukush Bridge ICT Services Company is a Kabul-based company specializing in providing internet services to NOGs, Government, local offices, and Home Users in Afghanistan. This company is 100% Afghan-owned and a team of highly qualified professionals having over a decade of experience in the various areas of ISP and ICT sector with different national and international organizations manages its operations.
Hindukush Bridge has a great partnership with most of the main players in the satellite and telecom industry. We are offering many added-value services to our partner/customer all over Afghanistan, along with a 24/7 hours Network Operation Center.
Hindukush Bridge ICT Services Company functioning under a valid License Number (66724) issued by the Ministry of Commerce and Industry by the name of Hindukush Bridge ICT Services Company the Company has professional and technical staff in various fields such as surveying, analyzing, budget estimation, project management, reporting and documentation, data-related issues.

Job Descriptions
Working with HKB-ICT requires full sort of work experience, strong interpersonal skills, good orientation towards working with people in group or lonely, strong intentions to work and grow, able to under loads and be task oriented.
The postholder will lead the development of our portfolio in Afghanistan, including identifying future business development opportunities and overseeing the writing of new project proposals. The post holder will ensure effective office management so that all functions are carried out in line with organization rules, local regulatory requirements and HKB-ICT guidelines.
Generally, applicants need to earn at least three years of professional experience in the fields of installation, troubleshoots, alignment and other information technology related area within the relevant scope of business.
You must be able to form and cultivate effective relationships huge range of customer at all levels, which will be considered as key to your success. You should be able to manage effective teamwork.
You must also have strong presentation, negotiation, and communication skills, be able to make decisions concerning IT goral and be able to manage multiple priorities simultaneously. Managers in this industry should have strong technical skills. Some courses you may take for a degree program related to IT technical clerk include the following:
Information Technology
Networking

Job Requirements
A compassionate and Transmission Officer, you’ll need to bring substantial experience in the management, interpersonal skills, motivation to work under various circumstances and develop new customers for the organization as per the guidelines provided by the senior executives.
This remains highly important that you should be able to manage large-scale of work and load, face different challenges and work complexities, with strong and proven quality to deliver high-quality representation of the company to the society within the deadline and budget.
Beyond these critical, core areas of skills and experience, you will also have to:
KEY COMPETEN
CIES AND REQUIREMENTS
Good Customer Service Skill
Excellent Communication Skill
Verbal and Written Skills
Good Skill and Knowledge in IT Network Security
Excellent Technical Skill in IT Network Routing and Switching (CCNA, MCP, MTCNA, Huawei RTN)
Language requirements: English
Ability to meet deadlines; work under pressure, tact, negotiation skills, organizational skills etc.
Analytical and problem-solving skills and decision-making skills.
Be familiar with network operating system and Telecommunication basics
DUTIES AND RESPONSIBLITIES
Install and configure wireless point to multipoint antennas.
Install and configure wireless equipment plus home AP, routers and switch.
Troubleshoot the client indoor units and routers.
Documents and report network problems and resolution for future reference.
Have a sound knowledge of latest wireless technologies and equipment.
Able to climb on tower and work at heights
Familiar with ISP power system components.
Install Telecom/IT equipment at customer premises
Connect and set up hardware and point to point testing
Input and maintain IP addresses and be familiar with getting remote access
know all troubleshooting procedure and IP related commands
Respond to user needs and questions regarding network access.
Perform other related duties as required during working hours programs

Submission Guidelines
While applying kindly mention the Vacancy number Transmission/HKB/2026/Kabul in the subject line of E-mail.
Otherwise, your application may not be considered.
Please do not send heavy size documents (i.e. Tazkira, Education documents, work certificates and etc.)
Only shortlisted candidates will be called for the next stage of recruitment.
NOTE: Local professionals with above mentioned criterias are prefferred.

Submission Email
hr@hindukush-bridge.com
Apply

details.Salary: As per company salary scale policy

expiring_today.title: IT Help-desk Representative
expiring_today.salary: As per organization salary policy per month
expiring_today.description:
About New Kabul Bank
New Kabul Bank started its banking activities on 18 April 2011 by having received its license as a commercial bank under banking system of the country. Ministry of Finance is the shareholder of New Kabul Bank.
New Kabul Bank is operating by CBS system and providing services for valued citizens by covering a wide network with professional and experienced cadre.

Job Descriptions
Job Description: (شرح وظیفه)
Provide end user support for all Information Technology products and services. Support includes software and hardware installation at end user level, providing network connectivity, OS and software update, answering questions, troubleshooting problems, teaching or instructing end users at HQ or branches regarding software or hardware functionality.
Enforce IT Department policies and procedures and ensures compliance with IT Department policy.
Determines the most effective manner to resolve client's technical issue. Engages in research and in-depth troubleshooting to resolve technical issues.
Provides remote support to end-users computers to troubleshoot, diagnose and resolve complex issues. While providing remote support, the Helpdesk Technician should record the session through screen recording application and store the recording in safe place for compliance and investigation related issue.
Records Issues / problems details in Helpdesk Ticketing System. Updates tickets with appropriate journal entries of activities, and closes tickets with resolution entered upon completion of the job.
Proper maintenance of documentation for the technical tasks performed for end users.
Visits NKB branches at Kabul Zone to ensure the computing devices are operational as per need.
Knowledge sharing and training of fellow team members.
Submits weekly work reports to immediate supervisor.
Can be officially assigned to Monthly Procurement team and control as per need.
Any other task assigned by direct supervisor.

Job Requirements
EDUCATION ( تحصیلات) : Bachelor Degree in Information Technology/ Computer Science / Information System.
EXPERIENCE ( تجارب): work of experience in related field is preferred.
SKILLS ( مهارت): Troubleshooting and problem solving skills. Good interpersonal and communication skills and the ability to work with frontline and senior staff.
WORKING RELATIONSHIPS: Works with other team members, including system administrators, network engineers, and core banking team.
ADDITIONAL REQUIREMENTS: On call availability

Submission Guidelines
Interested candidates are requested to send their applications along with copies of their CV and educational and work certificates to the hrd.cv@newkabulbank.af All candidates short-listed for interviews will be directly contacted.
Kindly copy the vacancy number and past it in your e-mail subject line with the position title, otherwise you won’t be short listed.

Submission Email
hrd.cv@newkabulbank.af
Apply

expiring_soon.title: 275-System Administrator (Specialized in Linux, Windows Servers, VMware ESXi, and vCenter)
expiring_soon.description:
About Ministry of Finance
Directorate of Information Communication Technology at Ministry of Finance mainly focusing in the area providing data and voice services for MoF operations using highly-equipped data center, unified transmission system, and interconnected links via fiber and microwaves.
Directorate of ICT is providing reliable and secure platform for overall data and voice connectivity and access to MoF core application services in MoF HQs and sites.

Job Descriptions
The primary objective of the System Administrator is to design, implement, maintain, and monitor the organization's server and virtualization infrastructure. The role focuses on delivering high availability, security, and efficiency in systems management while supporting business operations.

Job Requirements
Department: ICT Directorate
Location: Ministry of finance
Reports to: Director of ICT / Head of Network Administration
Background
The organization operates a multi-branch enterprise network with centralized data center services. The infrastructure includes Cisco routing and switching, DMVPN WAN architecture, Sophos Next-Generation Firewalls, and VMware virtualization platform. A CCIE-level architect is required to design, secure, and optimize this environment following international best practices.
Key Responsibilities
Server Administration
• Install, configure, and maintain Linux and Windows Server operating systems.
• Manage Active Directory (AD) and Group Policy Objects (GPOs) in Windows environments.
• Ensure regular patch management and updates for Linux and Windows systems.
• Implement and monitor system security measures, including firewalls, intrusion detection, and encryption technologies.
Virtualization Management
• Deploy, configure, and manage VMware ESXi hosts and vCenter infrastructure.
• Monitor and optimize the performance of virtual machines (VMs) and physical hosts.
• Manage VMware-related components such as vSAN, DRS, and HA.
• Handle VM backup, restoration, and disaster recovery procedures.
Systems Maintenance and Monitoring
• Implement monitoring solutions to track the health and performance of systems.
• Conduct root-cause analysis for server and infrastructure-related issues.
• Ensure adherence to best practices in system performance tuning and capacity planning.
Automation and Scripting
• Automate routine administrative tasks using scripting languages like PowerShell, Bash, or Python.
• Develop scripts for backups, monitoring, and system health checks.
Documentation and Reporting
• Create and maintain comprehensive documentation for systems configurations, processes, and procedures.
• Prepare and present regular reports on system performance, incidents, and planned maintenance.
Support and Collaboration
• Provide Level 2/3 technical support for server and virtualization-related issues.
• Collaborate with the network, application, and database teams to ensure seamless IT operations.
• Train junior staff and provide guidance on system-related tasks.
Required Qualifications and Experience
Education:
• Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or related field.
• Certifications such as RHCSA/RHCE, MCSA/MCSE, VMware VCP-DCV are preferred.
Experience:
• Minimum 3-5 years of experience in Linux and Windows server administration.
• Proven expertise in VMware ESXi and vCenter environments.
• Experience in managing high-availability systems and disaster recovery planning.
Technical Skills:
• Proficiency in Linux (e.g., CentOS, RHEL, Ubuntu) and Windows Server (2016/2019/2022) environments.
• Hands-on experience with VMware vSphere, including vCenter, vSAN, DRS, and HA.
• Strong understanding of TCP/IP, DNS, DHCP, and other networking protocols.
• Knowledge of backup and recovery tools (e.g., Veeam, NetBackup).
• Scripting proficiency in Bash, PowerShell, or Python.
Key Competencies
• Strong problem-solving and analytical skills.
• Excellent communication and documentation skills.
• Ability to work under pressure and meet deadlines.
• Attention to detail and commitment to maintaining high standards.
• Team player with a proactive approach to work.
Deliverables
• A secure and high-performing server and virtualization environment.
• Detailed and updated system documentation.
• Reports on incidents, system performance, and maintenance activities.
• Training sessions and knowledge transfer for ICT staff.

Submission Guidelines
Qualified applicants are encouraged to submit their CVs with a detailed application letter and contact details, no later than 9-Jul-2026 to below e-mail:
Please clearly indicate “position name/vacancy number in the subject line.
Please do not attach your education and working experience documents.

Submission Email
nta@mof.gov.af
Apply

details.Experience: Minimum 3-5 years of experience in Linux and Windows server administration
details.Education: • Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or related field. Certifications such as RHCSA/RHCE, MCSA/MCSE, VMware VCP-DCV are preferred
details.Years of Experience: Minimum 3-5 years of experience in Linux and Windows server administration

expiring_soon.title: 276-Senior Network & Data Center Architect (CCIE Level)
expiring_soon.description:
About Ministry of Finance
Directorate of Information Communication Technology at Ministry of Finance mainly focusing in the area providing data and voice services for MoF operations using highly-equipped data center, unified transmission system, and interconnected links via fiber and microwaves.
Directorate of ICT is providing reliable and secure platform for overall data and voice connectivity and access to MoF core application services in MoF HQs and sites.

Job Descriptions
The organization operates a multi-branch enterprise network with centralized data center services. The infrastructure includes Cisco routing and switching, DMVPN WAN architecture, Sophos Next-Generation Firewalls, and VMware virtualization platform. A CCIE-level architect is required to design, secure, and optimize this environment following international best practices.

Job Requirements
. Objectives
• Design scalable and resilient enterprise network architecture.
• Implement secure Cisco DMVPN WAN connectivity.
• Architect Sophos Firewall multi-zone security framework.
• Design Tier-2/Tier-3 Data Center architecture.
• Implement VMware vSphere high-availability clusters.
• Ensure Zero Trust segmentation and high availability.
Cisco Enterprise Network
• Hierarchical Core / Distribution / Access design.
• OSPF multi-area and BGP WAN edge routing.
• HSRP/VRRP gateway redundancy.
• VLAN design and segmentation.
• QoS for ERP and VoIP.
• NetFlow, SNMPv3, and monitoring integration.
DMVPN WAN Architecture
• Dual Hub DMVPN Phase 3 architecture.
• mGRE tunnels with NHRP configuration.
• IPsec IKEv2 with AES-256 encryption.
• Routing over DMVPN (OSPF/EIGRP/BGP).
• IP SLA tracking and automatic failover.
• QoS pre-classify and bandwidth control.
Sophos Firewall
• Multi-zone segmentation (WAN, LAN, DMZ, Server, VPN, Guest).
• IPS, ATP, SSL inspection, Application Control.
• Web Application Firewall for public services.
• Active-Passive High Availability design.
• Firewall rule matrix and Zero Trust policy implementation.
Data Center Design
• Dual core switch design.
• Redundant ISP and firewall connectivity.
• Rack elevation and power redundancy planning.
• Storage network segmentation.
• Disaster Recovery architecture.
VMware Virtualization
• vSphere cluster with HA and DRS.
• Distributed Virtual Switch (VDS).
• Resource sizing and capacity planning.
• Backup and snapshot governance policy.
• Secure management and segmentation.
Security & Compliance
• Micro-segmentation strategy.
• Control Plane Policing (CoPP).
• Certificate-based authentication.
• Logging, SIEM integration, and monitoring.
• Failover testing documentation.
Deliverables
• High-Level Design (HLD).
• Low-Level Design (LLD).
• IP Addressing & VLAN Matrix.
• DMVPN Tunnel Plan.
• Firewall Security Matrix.
• Data Center Physical & Logical Diagrams.
• Disaster Recovery Plan.
• Knowledge Transfer & Documentation.
Required Qualifications
• Cisco CCIE (Enterprise Infrastructure preferred).
• Minimum 10 years enterprise networking experience.
• Proven Sophos Firewall architecture experience.
• Data Center design expertise.
• VMware VCP/VCAP certification preferred.
Performance Indicators (KPIs)
• Network uptime ≥ 99.9%.
• Zero critical misconfiguration findings.
• Successful failover test validation.
• Documented and approved architecture design.

Submission Guidelines
Qualified applicants are encouraged to submit their CVs with a detailed application letter and contact details, no later than 9-JUL-2026 to below e-mail:
Please clearly indicate “position name/vacancy number in the subject line.
Please do not attach your education and working experience documents.

Submission Email
nta@mof.gov.af
Apply

details.Experience: • Cisco CCIE (Enterprise Infrastructure preferred). • Minimum 10 years enterprise networking experience. • Proven Sophos Firewall architecture experience. • Data Center design expertise. • VMware VCP/VCAP certification preferred.
details.Education: • Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or related field.
details.Years of Experience: • Cisco CCIE (Enterprise Infrastructure preferred). • Minimum 10 years enterprise networking experience. • Proven Sophos Firewall architecture experience. • Data Center design expertise. • VMware VCP/VCAP certification preferred.

expiring_soon.title: 277-Senior Cyber Security Specialist
expiring_soon.description:
About Ministry of Finance
Directorate of Information Communication Technology at Ministry of Finance mainly focusing in the area providing data and voice services for MoF operations using highly-equipped data center, unified transmission system, and interconnected links via fiber and microwaves.
Directorate of ICT is providing reliable and secure platform for overall data and voice connectivity and access to MoF core application services in MoF HQs and sites.

Job Descriptions
As the sole dedicated cybersecurity specialist, the primary objective is to act as the MoF’s internal "ethical hacker" and security architect. The role aims to:
Proactively identify and exploit vulnerabilities in the MoF’s networks, applications, and financial systems through rigorous, hands-on penetration testing.
Establish foundational security monitoring and incident response capabilities in the absence of a traditional SOC.
Provide expert technical guidance to the broader ICT team to remediate identified vulnerabilities.
Build a resilient security posture from the ground up, balancing deep technical execution with strategic risk management.

Job Requirements
Scope of Work and Key Responsibilities
Given the standalone nature of this role, the Specialist must be highly self-motivated, capable of deep technical execution, and skilled at prioritizing high-risk areas.
Heavy Penetration Testing & Offensive Security (Core Focus)
Conduct regular, in-depth, hands-on penetration testing on the MoF’s internal/external networks, web applications, APIs, mobile applications, and critical financial systems.
Perform advanced manual testing to identify complex vulnerabilities (e.g., business logic flaws, authentication bypasses, injection attacks) that automated scanners miss.
Conduct social engineering and phishing campaigns to test the human element of the MoF’s security posture.
Vendor Management: While executing continuous internal pen-testing, design the scope for and manage external third-party vendors for comprehensive, enterprise-wide annual penetration tests.
Vulnerability Management & Remediation
Deploy, configure, and manage automated vulnerability scanning tools across the MoF’s infrastructure.
Analyze scan results, filter out false positives, and prioritize vulnerabilities based on the specific threat landscape of the financial sector.
Work directly with system administrators, network engineers, and application developers to verify and validate the remediation of identified flaws.
Foundational Security Monitoring & Incident Response
design, implement, and manage a centralized log management and basic SIEM (Security Information and Event Management) solution.
Act as the primary (Tier 1, 2, and 3) Incident Responder. Investigate security alerts, contain breaches, eradicate threats, and recover systems during a cyber incident.
Develop and maintain automated alerting rules to notify the Specialist and ICT management of critical security events.
Security Architecture & Automation
Advise the ICT Directorate on secure architecture for new financial systems, , and network expansions (Security by Design).
Develop scripts and automate repetitive security tasks (e.g., using Python, Bash, or PowerShell) to maximize efficiency and scale security efforts without additional headcount.
Key Deliverables
Penetration Testing Reports: Comprehensive, technical, and executive-level reports following every internal penetration test, including proof-of-concept exploits and step-by-step remediation guides.
Vulnerability Dashboard: A continuously updated, automated dashboard showing the MoF’s vulnerability posture, aging of critical vulnerabilities, and remediation SLA compliance.
Incident Response Plan (IRP): A documented and tested IRP tailored for a standalone responder, including clear escalation matrices to external law enforcement or emergency IT support.
Security Monitoring Baseline: Successful deployment and tuning of a centralized logging/SIEM solution with active alerts for critical financial systems within the first [6 months].
Quarterly Security Posture Report: An executive summary for the Director of ICT detailing the threat landscape, tests conducted, critical risks discovered, and remediation progress.
Reporting and Coordination
Direct Reporting: Reports directly to the Director of ICT.
Internal Coordination: Works closely with Network Administrators, Database Administrators, and Software Developers to ensure vulnerabilities are patched without disrupting critical treasury operations.
External Coordination: Acts as the technical point of contact for external penetration testing firms, managed security service providers.
Qualifications and Experience
Education:
Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Cybersecurity, Information Technology, or a closely related field.
Experience:
Exactly/At least Seven (7) years of progressive, hands-on professional experience in Cybersecurity, with a heavy emphasis on technical execution rather than pure management.
Minimum of three (3) to four (4) years of dedicated, hands-on experience specifically in Penetration Testing and Offensive Security.
Proven experience conducting pen tests on complex environments, specifically web applications, APIs, and network infrastructure.
Experience operating as a standalone security practitioner or building security programs from scratch is highly desirable.
Certifications:
Mandatory (Offensive Security): Must hold a highly respected, practical penetration testing certification such as:
OSCP (Offensive Security Certified Professional) - Highly Preferred
OSEP, OSWE, or PEN-300.
Alternatives: CEH (Certified Ethical Hacker) or CompTIA PenTest+ (only if accompanied by strong proven practical experience).
Desirable (General/Defensive): CISSP, CISM, or BTL1 (Blue Team Level 1) to complement the offensive skills with governance and defensive knowledge.
Required Skills and Competencies
Technical Skills (Heavy Offensive Focus):
Expert-level proficiency with penetration testing frameworks and tools (e.g., Burp Suite Professional, Metasploit, Cobalt Strike, Nmap, Nessus, SQLmap).
Deep understanding of the OWASP Top 10, SANS Top 25, and advanced exploitation techniques.
Strong scripting and automation skills (Python, Bash, PowerShell) to write custom exploits, automate scanning, and parse logs.
Solid understanding of defensive security, network protocols, and how to configure log aggregation tools (e.g., Splunk, ELK, Wazuh) for a solo analyst.
Soft Skills:
Self-Starter & Time Management: Ability to work independently, prioritize tasks ruthlessly, and manage time effectively without direct supervision.
Technical Translation: Ability to explain complex, highly technical exploitation chains to non-technical financial executives and translate them into business risks.
High Integrity: Unquestionable ethical standards

Submission Guidelines
Qualified applicants are encouraged to submit their CVs with a detailed application letter and contact details, no later than 9-Jul-2026 to below e-mail:
Please clearly indicate “position name/vacancy number in the subject line.
Please do not attach your education and working experience documents.

Submission Email
nta@mof.gov.af
Apply

details.Experience: Exactly/At least Seven (7) years of progressive, hands-on professional experience in Cybersecurity, with a heavy emphasis on technical execution rather than pure management
details.Education: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Cybersecurity, Information Technology, or a closely related field.
details.Years of Experience: Exactly/At least Seven (7) years of progressive, hands-on professional experience in Cybersecurity, with a heavy emphasis on technical execution rather than pure management

expiring_soon.title: کارمند تکنالوژی کمره های امنیتی، ریاست حیرتان
expiring_soon.description:
Role Summary
تأمین، حفظ و مراقبت سیستم‌های تکنالوژی معلوماتی، شبکه‌های کمپیوتری و کمره‌های امنیتی اداره به‌منظور تضمین امنیت اطلاعات، تداوم فعالیت سیستم‌ها، نظارت مؤثر بر ساحات تحت پوشش و فراهم‌سازی خدمات تخنیکی مورد نیاز برای بخش‌های مختلف اداره.

Duties and Responsibilities
· ترتیب پلان کاری ماهوار، ربعوار و سالانه در مطابقت با پلان مدیریت مربوطه جهت رسیدن به اهداف تعیین‌شده اداره.
· نصب، تنظیم و راه‌اندازی کمپیوترها، پرنترها، اسکنرها، تجهیزات شبکه و سایر وسایل تکنالوژی معلوماتی مطابق نیازمندی اداره.
· نصب، تنظیم، عیب‌یابی و حفظ و مراقبت کمره‌های امنیتی، دستگاه‌های ثبت تصاویر و تجهیزات جانبی آن.
· نظارت دوامدار از فعالیت سیستم کمره‌های امنیتی و اتخاذ اقدامات لازم جهت رفع مشکلات تخنیکی و جلوگیری از وقفه در فعالیت آن‌ها.
· ثبت، نگهداری و آرشیف تصاویر و ویدیوهای ثبت‌شده مطابق اصول، طرزالعمل‌ها و رهنمودهای نافذۀ اداره.
· بررسی و تشخیص عیوب شبکه‌های کمپیوتری، تجهیزات مخابراتی و سیستم‌های نظارتی و انجام اقدامات لازم جهت رفع آن‌ها.
· همکاری در نصب، توسعه و حفظ و مراقبت شبکۀ داخلی، اینترنت و سایر سیستم‌های ارتباطی اداره.
· انجام سرویس‌های وقایوی و ترمیمی تجهیزات تکنالوژی معلوماتی و کمره‌های امنیتی به منظور جلوگیری از خرابی‌های احتمالی.
· مدیریت حساب‌های کاربری، دسترسی‌های سیستم و رعایت تدابیر امنیت سایبری در هماهنگی با مسئولین مربوطه.
· تهیه راپورهای تخنیکی در مورد وضعیت تجهیزات، سیستم‌ها، مشکلات موجود و اقدامات انجام‌شده جهت ارائه به مدیر مربوط.
· ارائه همکاری‌های تخنیکی به کارکنان اداره در زمینه استفاده از سیستم‌های کمپیوتری، نرم‌افزارها و تجهیزات تکنالوژی معلوماتی.
· اشتراک در بررسی نیازمندی‌های تخنیکی اداره و ارائه پیشنهادات لازم جهت بهبود سیستم‌های تکنالوژی معلوماتی و امنیتی.
· کنترول و نظارت از ذخیره‌گاه‌های معلوماتی، سرورها و تجهیزات مربوطه جهت تأمین مصئونیت و دسترسی به اطلاعات.
· حفظ و مراقبت اسناد، تجهیزات و وسایل تخنیکی سپرده‌شده مطابق اصول و مقررات اداره.
· ترتیب و ارائه گزارشات ماهوار، ربعوار، سالانه از فعالیت ها و دست آورد ها مدیر مربوطه.
· اجرای سایر وظایف مرتبط که از سوی آمرین ذیصلاح مطابق قوانین، مقررات و اهداف اداره سپرده می‌شود.

Job Requirements
· داشتن سند تحصیلی حداقل فوق بکلوریا در رشته‌های تکنالوژی معلوماتی، کمپیوتر ساینس یا سایر رشته‌های مرتبط به وظیفه.
· داشتن حداقل ۲ سال تجریه کاری مرتبط به وظیفه- حایز سند تحصیلی لیسانس از این حکم مستثنی می باشد.

Submission Guidelines
رهنمایی ثبت نام متقاضیان:
متقاضیان محترم برای ثبت نام روی لینک زیر کلیک نموده معلومات خویش را ارسال بدارند.
http://178.18.249.112:8080/Recruit/Applicant/ApplicantApply/494C8352-89E1-487E-A721-DA8BB7350821
درجریان ثبت نام موارد ذیل را در نظر داشته باشند:
１. تمام معلومات خویش را دقیق برویت اسناد درج نمایند در صورت نادرست بودن معلومات درج شده متقاضی از پروسه
حذف میگردد.
2. یک فرد صرف یکبار ثبت نام کرده میتواند.
3. در قسمت درج عنوان بست و کود بست دقت لازم نمائید.
آدرس: ریاست عمومی شرکت امارتی نفت و گاز افغانستان واقع کوتل خیرخانه جوار ناحیه هفدهم، کابل- افغانستان درصورت ضرورت به شماره ذیل تماس گرفته میتوانید: 0202930023
نوت: تنها برای کاندیدانی تماس گرفته میشود که در بست متذکره شارت لست گردند.
امتحان بست متذکره در ریاست شرکت امارتی نفت و گاز بندر حیرتان واقع ولایت بلخ اخذ میگردد.

expiring_soon.title: Graphic Designer
expiring_soon.description:
About Afghan Institute of Learning (AIL)
The Afghan Institute of Learning (AIL) is a non-governmental and non-profit national NGO that was founded in 1995 by Dr. Sakena Yacoobi to provide education, training, and health services to vulnerable Afghans.
The Afghan Institute of Learning (AIL) believes in a community-based, tailored, holistic approach that provides access to health care and education.
Currently, across 11 provinces, AIL runs 44 Learning Centers, 6 health hospitals and health clinics, and 14 village-based Community Health Worker posts.

Job Descriptions
The successful candidate is responsible for creating high-quality visual materials that support the organization's publications, communications, branding, and outreach activities. The selected candidate will produce creative and professional designs for both print and digital media while ensuring consistency with the organization's visual identity and publishing standards.
Key Responsibilities
Design and professionally lay out books, magazines, reports, and other print and digital publications.
Design book covers, magazine covers, and other publishing materials.
Prepare print-ready files in accordance with professional printing and publishing standards.
Design banners, posters, brochures, standees, billboards, and other printed and digital promotional materials.
Collaborate with the Publications Department to enhance the visual quality of the organization's publications.

Job Requirements
Minimum of three (3) years of proven experience in graphic design, particularly in book, magazine, report, and publication layout.
Strong knowledge of typography, page layout, composition, color management, and print production processes.
Experience in preparing print-ready files according to professional printing standards.
Ability to design creative and visually appealing materials for both print and digital platforms.
Excellent attention to detail, creativity, and organizational skills.
Ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously and meet deadlines.
Strong communication and teamwork skills, with the ability to collaborate effectively across departments.
Strong communication and teamwork skills, with the ability to collaborate effectively across departments.
A relevant portfolio demonstrating previous design work is required and must be presented during the interview.

Submission Guidelines
Interested candidates who meet the above requirements are invited to submit their Curriculum Vitae (CV) along with a maximum of three (3) portfolio samples . Please clearly mention the Job Vacancy (AILGR26) in the subject line of your email.
Applications must be sent no later than Saturday, 11 July 2026 to the following email address: ailjob.hr24@gmail.com
Note:
This position is open only to qualified Graphic Design professionals with demonstrated full proficiency in the three software applications mentioned above. Candidates who do not meet the required qualifications are respectfully advised not to apply. Selection will be based primarily on the quality of the portfolio, relevant professional experience, creativity, and overall technical competence of the applicant.

Submission Email
ailjob.hr24@gmail.com
Apply

details.Education: Bachelor’s degree in a related field. Additional certifications or training in Adobe Creative Suite (InDesign, Photoshop, Illustrator) will be considered an advantage.

tech_banking_jobs.title: IT Help-desk Representative
tech_banking_jobs.salary: As per organization salary policy per month
tech_banking_jobs.description:
About New Kabul Bank
New Kabul Bank started its banking activities on 18 April 2011 by having received its license as a commercial bank under banking system of the country. Ministry of Finance is the shareholder of New Kabul Bank.
New Kabul Bank is operating by CBS system and providing services for valued citizens by covering a wide network with professional and experienced cadre.

Job Descriptions
Job Description: (شرح وظیفه)
Provide end user support for all Information Technology products and services. Support includes software and hardware installation at end user level, providing network connectivity, OS and software update, answering questions, troubleshooting problems, teaching or instructing end users at HQ or branches regarding software or hardware functionality.
Enforce IT Department policies and procedures and ensures compliance with IT Department policy.
Determines the most effective manner to resolve client's technical issue. Engages in research and in-depth troubleshooting to resolve technical issues.
Provides remote support to end-users computers to troubleshoot, diagnose and resolve complex issues. While providing remote support, the Helpdesk Technician should record the session through screen recording application and store the recording in safe place for compliance and investigation related issue.
Records Issues / problems details in Helpdesk Ticketing System. Updates tickets with appropriate journal entries of activities, and closes tickets with resolution entered upon completion of the job.
Proper maintenance of documentation for the technical tasks performed for end users.
Visits NKB branches at Kabul Zone to ensure the computing devices are operational as per need.
Knowledge sharing and training of fellow team members.
Submits weekly work reports to immediate supervisor.
Can be officially assigned to Monthly Procurement team and control as per need.
Any other task assigned by direct supervisor.

Job Requirements
EDUCATION ( تحصیلات) : Bachelor Degree in Information Technology/ Computer Science / Information System.
EXPERIENCE ( تجارب): work of experience in related field is preferred.
SKILLS ( مهارت): Troubleshooting and problem solving skills. Good interpersonal and communication skills and the ability to work with frontline and senior staff.
WORKING RELATIONSHIPS: Works with other team members, including system administrators, network engineers, and core banking team.
ADDITIONAL REQUIREMENTS: On call availability

Submission Guidelines
Interested candidates are requested to send their applications along with copies of their CV and educational and work certificates to the hrd.cv@newkabulbank.af All candidates short-listed for interviews will be directly contacted.
Kindly copy the vacancy number and past it in your e-mail subject line with the position title, otherwise you won’t be short listed.

Submission Email
hrd.cv@newkabulbank.af
Apply

details.Salary: As per organization salary policy per month
details.Experience: با داشتن تجربه کاری در بخش مرتبط ترجیح داده میشود .
details.Education: Bachelors in Computer Science or IT
details.Years of Experience: با داشتن تجربه کاری در بخش مرتبط ترجیح داده میشود .

tech_banking_jobs.title: Payment Collection Officer (Female)
tech_banking_jobs.description:
About City Connect ICT Services
City Connect ICT Services was established on 08 May
2025 with the objective of providing high-quality Internet and ICT services
throughout Afghanistan. The company aims to contribute to the digital
transformation of Afghanistan by delivering reliable, secure, and affordable
connectivity solutions to residential, commercial, governmental, and
institutional customers.
The company is seeking renewal of its ICT License to
continue its operations and expand its services across additional provinces.
Through strategic partnerships with international connectivity providers such
as OmanTel and PTCL, City Connect ICT Services intends to deliver low-latency
and highly reliable Internet services to its customers.

Job Description
1.
Payment Collection
& Follow-ups:
Contact
customers and visits to remind them of overdue payments.
Follow
up on unpaid invoices and ensure timely collection of outstanding amounts.
Maintain
proper records of collections and pending payments/ invoices.
2.
Customer Interaction
& Support:
Address
customer inquiries regarding their bills, payment methods, and outstanding
balances.
Negotiate
payment plans with customers who face financial difficulties.
Provide
receipts and ensure smooth transactions.
3.
Billing & Account
Management:
Verify
customer account details and ensure billing accuracy.
Coordinate
with the relevant authority to resolve any discrepancies.
Keep
records of defaulters and escalate cases as needed.
4.
Legal & Recovery
Process:
Work
with legal teams for the recovery of long-overdue payments.
Issue
warnings and final notices to non-paying customers.
Recommend
disconnection of services for defaulters.
5.
Feedback & Coordination:
Work
closely with the finance and sales teams to improve collection efficiency.
Provide
feedback on customer behavior and potential risks.

Job Requirements
1. High school is required
2. Ability to handle difficult customers professionally.
3. Self-motivated with an ability to achieve 100%
targets/ collections.
4. Must be quite enough familiar in Kabul
City.
5. Strong negotiation and communication skills.
6. Attention to detail and problem-solving abilities.
7. Basic understanding of legal procedures related to debt
collection
8. Fluency in local languages i.e. Pashto / Dari is
required. knowledge of English language is an Asset.
9. at least one year of experience in payment collections
or accounts receivable (preferably in an ISP or telecom company)

Submission Guidelines
Applicants meeting the above
requirements are requested to apply for this vacancy through email stated above
only.
Important Notes:
1. Please attach your Supporting documents, e.g. Certificates, HR letters, CV and Tazkira. for further screening
purpose.
2. Only short-listed candidates will be contacted for
further assessment.

tech_banking_jobs.title: Digital Banking Technical Officer - ATM & POS
tech_banking_jobs.description:
Role Summary
The Digital Banking Technical Officer – ATM & POS is primarily responsible for the end-to-end support, maintenance, and troubleshooting of Afghan United Bank’s ATM and POS infrastructure. This includes managing hardware and software operations, ensuring uptime and functionality, and coordinating with vendors for deployment, upgrades, and issue resolution. The role is vital to maintaining the reliability and effectiveness of self-service and point-of-sale banking services.

Duties and Responsibilities
· Monitor ATM and card switch systems (AfPay, MasterCard, Visa) to ensure continuous service availability and timely issue resolution.
· Resolve difficult situations and malfunction of ATMs/POS effectively by analyzing the situation and identifying potential solutions and ensuring a high level of customer satisfaction.
· Oversee technical testing and implementation of ATMs and POS.
· Maintain of all communicational and networking issues related to ATM/POS
· Mobile Money
· Provide first-level technical support for ATMs, POS terminals, Mobile Banking, Internet Banking, and E-Commerce Gateway services.
· Monitor ATM and card switch systems (AfPay, MasterCard, Visa) to ensure continuous service availability and timely issue resolution.
· Coordinate with the switch vendor and third-party service providers for system upgrades, configurations, and incident management.
· Support onboarding and technical setup of POS merchants and E-Commerce merchants, including configuration and testing.
· Assist in testing and implementation of new digital banking features, services, and systems.
· Maintain accurate logs and documentation of technical activities, incidents, and changes.
· Ensure timely follow-up and escalation of unresolved issues to appropriate teams or vendors.
· Collaborate with internal departments to resolve customer-facing technical issues and contribute to service improvement.
· Adhere to internal IT, cybersecurity, and compliance standards for all supported platforms.
Participate in business continuity and contingency support processes for digital systems.

Job Requirements
Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Electronics, or a related technical field.
Minimum 2 years of hands-on experience in ATM and/or POS maintenance and support, preferably in a banking or financial environment.
Strong knowledge of ATM and POS hardware components, software configurations, and troubleshooting.
Familiarity with ATM switch systems and integration protocols.
Understanding of network connectivity and remote management tools.
Ability to manage vendor coordination and service level monitoring.

Submission Guidelines
Interested candidates who deem themselves suitable for this vacancy can share their complete profile including (application letter, updated CV, and recent photo) electronically to below mentioned email and please indicate the vacancy number (AUB/EA/VA/026-029) in the subject line of your email otherwise your application will not be considered.
Only shortlisted candidates who have completed the requirements of the vacancy will be called for further selection process.

tech_banking_jobs.description:
Role Summary
Conducting field research in Baghlan Province, Afghanistan, or writing research reports on Afghanistan-related topics.
Requires quick work execution, competent English skills, honesty and reliability, and extensive knowledge or connections in Baghlan Province.

Duties and Responsibilities
Conducting field research in Baghlan Province, Afghanistan, or writing research reports on Afghanistan-related topics.

Job Requirements
Residing in Baghlan Province, Afghanistan; possessing basic English writing and communication skills; preference will be given to candidates with relevant government, military, or investigator experience; male candidates preferred

Submission Guidelines
Please submit your English resume on this website. Name your resume with your name and occupation. The resume should include your phone number, education, and detailed work experience (specifying position, company name, and responsibilities). Please update your resume regularly. Company staff will contact you via email; please check your inbox.
